title: HYP: DCB BTCUSDT 5m - High-frequency Donchian breakout as last BTCUSDT BTC option
content: DonchianBreakoutEngine at 5m as final untested BTCUSDT interval. DCB showed: 4h=NOT_ROBUST WF, 1h=NO_EDGE, 15m=NO_EDGE. 5m generates highest frequency (n_trades=1000-3000 per draw). The DCB mechanism (Donchian breakout + ADX + RVOL) may work at 5m if: channel is short (N=5-15), ADX threshold is higher to filter noise (adxEntryMin=25-35), and RVOL is high (rvolMin=1.5-2.5). At 5m, breakout momentum is real (BTC moves fast). Risk: 5m is noisier than 15m which was already NO_EDGE. Very low probability of edge. Testing per loop rules (continue with least-recently-tested archetype until exhaustion confirmed).

structured_data.mechanism: Donchian-N breakout, ADX trend confirmation, RVOL surge, break-even shift
structured_data.expected_outcome: NO_EDGE - low probability given 15m was NO_EDGE; testing to exhaust BTCUSDT DCB archetype
